overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a wizarding school adventure game, following a student character through various interior locations including a spiral tower staircase, stone corridors, a grand portrait hall, and an astronomy classroom with detailed Gothic architecture and magical elements.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a stone corridor illuminated by natural light from tall arched windows. The walls feature wooden wainscoting, and the segment ends as the character approaches and passes through a doorway with blue stained glass into a larger space.

Other students walk about, and a purple magical effect is visible in the background near a large stone fireplace.

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long hallway with dark wood paneling and walls featuring inscribed wooden plaques. A stone statue stands on a pedestal to the left. The segment ends as the character opens a heavy wooden door and enters a classroom.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious, high-ceilinged astronomy classroom filled with natural light from tall windows. The room contains scientific instruments including an armillary sphere, stacked books, and a large chalkboard covered with astronomical diagrams. The character explores the room, looking up at the chandeliers and approaching the chalkboard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit confines of a spiral tower down into the expansive grandeur of a bustling school hall. It begins by descending a wooden spiral staircase with blue paneled walls, where warm light from wall sconces guides the character toward a bright circular landing and an arched doorway. As the character passes through the threshold, the environment shifts into a stone corridor illuminated by natural light streaming through tall arched windows. The scene then expands as the camera moves through a blue stained-glass doorway, opening into a vast hall with high vaulted wooden beams and walls densely lined with animated gold-framed portraits. Finally, the perspective settles within this lively space, passing other students and a purple magical glow emanating from a large stone fireplace.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed corridor into a vast, light-filled astronomy classroom. It begins by trailing the character down a long hallway lined with dark wood paneling and inscribed plaques, passing a stone statue on a pedestal. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the scene shifts as they open a heavy wooden door to enter a spacious room with high ceilings. The environment then expands into a bright interior illuminated by tall windows, revealing scientific instruments, an armillary sphere, and stacks of books. Finally, the camera explores the airy space, glancing up at the chandeliers before turning toward a large chalkboard covered in astronomical diagrams.
